name: che-apple-mail-mcp
description: Apple Mail MCP server — 47 tools, reply-as-draft + IDD task enforcement + NSQL confirmation + .claude/.mail/ namespace (shell v2.17.0, binary v2.7.1)。Shell v2.17.0 (#49): Workspace Layout Detection — `output_dir` 未 explicit 指定時 probe `communications/email/` → `correspondence/emails/` → default,detection-first(not prescriptive);sibling-archive dedup extension 讀 symlinked subdir 的 `message_id:` frontmatter 併入 in-memory dedup set,讀 only,既有 explicit-config workspace 行為 100% 不變。疊加 v2.16.1 ship 鏈到 binary v2.7.1 (#72 base64 fix + #69 SQLite fast-path stderr logging + #66 .partial.emlx attachment fix);v2.16.0 config schema .md → .yaml (#47);v2.15.0 inline cid: 圖片保留 (#45);v2.14.0 dedup_strategy opt-in (#18);v2.13.0 markdown template 簡化 (#17);v2.12.0 zero-arg mode (#13/#21);v2.11.0 binary v2.7.0 multi-attachment race fix (#60);v2.6.0 marathon (8 PRs);v2.9.0 task enforcement;v2.8.0 namespace;v2.7.0 NSQL confirmation。
